question: A solutions architect is implementing a document review application using an Amazon S3 bucket for storage. The solution must prevent accidental deletion of the documents and ensure that all versions of the documents are available. Users must be able to download, modify, and upload documents. Which combination of actions should be taken to meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.A: Enable a read-only bucket ACL.
options.B: Enable versioning on the bucket.
options.C: Attach an IAM policy to the bucket.
options.D: Enable MFA Delete on the bucket.
options.E: Encrypt the bucket using AWS KMS.

explanations.A: Enable a read-only bucket ACL. 启用只读存储桶 ACL。 错误：启用只读 ACL 会限制用户对存储桶的写入权限，而题目要求用户能够下载、修改和上传文档。
explanations.B: Enable versioning on the bucket. 在存储桶上启用版本控制。 正确：启用版本控制可以确保所有文档的版本都被保存，从而防止意外删除或覆盖。
explanations.C: Attach an IAM policy to the bucket. 将 IAM 策略附加到存储桶。 错误：虽然 IAM 策略可以控制访问权限，但它不能防止意外删除或确保文档的版本可用性。
explanations.D: Enable MFA Delete on the bucket. 在存储桶上启用 MFA Delete。 正确：启用 MFA Delete 可以增加删除操作的安全性，防止意外删除。
explanations.E: Encrypt the bucket using AWS KMS. 使用 AWS KMS 加密存储桶。 错误：加密可以保护数据的安全性，但与防止意外删除和版本控制无关。

question: A company is building a solution that will report Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling events across all the applications in an AWS account. The company needs to use a serverless solution to store the EC2 Auto Scaling status data in Amazon S3. The company then will use the data in Amazon S3 to provide near-real-time updates in a dashboard. The solution must not affect the speed of EC2 instance launches. How should the company move the data to Amazon S3 to meet these requirements?

options.A: Use an Amazon CloudWatch metric stream to send the EC2 Auto Scaling status data to Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose. Store the data in Amazon S3.
options.B: Launch an Amazon EMR cluster to collect the EC2 Auto Scaling status data and send the data to Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose. Store the data in Amazon S3.
options.C: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to invoke an AWS Lambda function on a schedule. Configure the Lambda function to send the EC2 Auto Scaling status data directly to Amazon S3.
options.D: Use a bootstrap script during the launch of an EC2 instance to install Amazon Kinesis Agent. Configure Kinesis Agent to collect the EC2 Auto Scaling status data and send the data to Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose. Store the data in Amazon S3.

explanations.A: Use an Amazon CloudWatch metric stream to send the EC2 Auto Scaling status data to Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose. Store the data in Amazon S3. 正确：Amazon CloudWatch metric stream可以实时捕获EC2 Auto Scaling事件数据，并将其发送到Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose。 Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose可以直接将数据存储到Amazon S3，满足无服务器架构的要求。 此方案不会影响EC2实例启动速度，因为数据流是异步的。
explanations.B: Launch an Amazon EMR cluster to collect the EC2 Auto Scaling status data and send the data to Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose. Store the data in Amazon S3. 错误：Amazon EMR是一个大数据处理服务，通常用于复杂的批处理任务，而不是实时数据流处理。 使用EMR会增加复杂性和成本，不符合无服务器架构的要求。
explanations.C: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to invoke an AWS Lambda function on a schedule. Configure the Lambda function to send the EC2 Auto Scaling status data directly to Amazon S3. 错误：虽然EventBridge可以捕获事件并触发Lambda函数，但这种方法需要定期轮询，可能会导致延迟，无法实现近实时更新。 直接将数据发送到S3可能缺乏数据流的灵活性和扩展性。
explanations.D: Use a bootstrap script during the launch of an EC2 instance to install Amazon Kinesis Agent. Configure Kinesis Agent to collect the EC2 Auto Scaling status data and send the data to Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose. Store the data in Amazon S3. 错误：使用bootstrap脚本会增加EC2实例启动时间，直接影响实例启动速度。 Kinesis Agent通常用于日志数据收集，而不是处理EC2 Auto Scaling事件数据。

question: A company has an application that places hundreds of .csv files into an Amazon S3 bucket every hour. The files are 1 GB in size. Each time a file is uploaded, the company needs to convert the file to Apache Parquet format and place the output file into an S3 bucket. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Create an AWS Lambda function to download the .csv files, convert the files to Parquet format, and place the output files in an S3 bucket. Invoke the Lambda function for each S3 PUT event.
options.B: Create an Apache Spark job to read the .csv files, convert the files to Parquet format, and place the output files in an S3 bucket. Create an AWS Lambda function for each S3 PUT event to invoke the Spark job.
options.C: Create an AWS Glue table and an AWS Glue crawler for the S3 bucket where the application places the .csv files. Schedule an AWS Lambda function to periodically use Amazon Athena to query the AWS Glue table, convert the query results into Parquet format, and place the output files into an S3 bucket.
options.D: Create an AWS Glue extract, transform, and load (ETL) job to convert the .csv files to Parquet format and place the output files into an S3 bucket. Create an AWS Lambda function for each S3 PUT event to invoke the ETL job.

explanations.A: Create an AWS Lambda function to download the .csv files, convert the files to Parquet format, and place the output files in an S3 bucket. Invoke the Lambda function for each S3 PUT event. 正确性分析：虽然Lambda可以处理S3 PUT事件并执行转换，但由于文件大小为1GB，Lambda的内存和执行时輓輦制可能会导致失 败或性能輐轞。 结论：此辷轒迾误，因为它无法可轈处理大文件，且操作开迺较轸。
explanations.B: Create an Apache Spark job to read the .csv files, convert the files to Parquet format, and place the output files in an S3 bucket. Create an AWS Lambda function for each S3 PUT event to invoke the Spark job. 正确性分析：Apache Spark辴合处理大规模数据，但轀要轠外的基础设施（如Amazon EMR），增加了管理复杂性。 结论：此辷轒迾误，因为它增加了操作开迺，不符合“最低操作开迺”的要求。
explanations.C: Create an AWS Glue table and an AWS Glue crawler for the S3 bucket where the application places the .csv files. Schedule an AWS Lambda function to periodically use Amazon Athena to query the AWS Glue table, convert the query results into Parquet format, and place the output files into an S3 bucket. 正确性分析：此辷轒涉及多个服务（Glue、Athena、Lambda），流程复杂且轀要定期调度，增加了操作开迺。 结论：此辷轒迾误，因为它不符合“最低操作开迺”的要求。
explanations.D: Create an AWS Glue extract, transform, and load (ETL) job to convert the .csv files to Parquet format and place the output files into an S3 bucket. Create an AWS Lambda function for each S3 PUT event to invoke the ETL job. 正确性分析：AWS Glue ETL作业专为数据转换设计，支持大文件处理，且与S3輸成良好。达辟Lambda触发Glue作业，自动化程度 轸，操作开迺低。 结论：此辷轒正确，因为它满足“最低操作开迺”的要求。

question: A company is implementing new data retention policies for all databases that run on Amazon RDS DB instances. The company must retain daily backups for a minimum period of 2 years. The backups must be consistent and restorable. Which solution should a solutions architect recommend to meet these requirements?

options.A: Create a backup vault in AWS Backup to retain RDS backups. Create a new backup plan with a daily schedule and an expiration period of 2 years after creation. Assign the RDS DB instances to the backup plan.
options.B: Configure a backup window for the RDS DB instances for daily snapshots. Assign a snapshot retention policy of 2 years to each RDS DB instance. Use Amazon Data Lifecycle Manager (Amazon DLM) to schedule snapshot deletions.
options.C: Configure database transaction logs to be automatically backed up to Amazon CloudWatch Logs with an expiration period of 2 years.
options.D: Configure an AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) replication task. Deploy a replication instance, and configure a change data capture (CDC) task to stream database changes to Amazon S3 as the target. Configure S3 Lifecycle policies to delete the snapshots after 2 years.

explanations.A: Create a backup vault in AWS Backup to retain RDS backups. Create a new backup plan with a daily schedule and an expiration period of 2 years after creation. Assign the RDS DB instances to the backup plan. 正畧：AWS Backup是专輍设计甠于輸中疲理和自动化备份甹服务。它支持RDS备份，并允许设甅备份计划和保甪疬甫。 正畧：可以创建备份库并定义备份计划，包括每日备份和2年甹保甪期，完全疥合轞畉要求。
explanations.B: Configure a backup window for the RDS DB instances for daily snapshots. Assign a snapshot retention policy of 2 years to each RDS DB instance. Use Amazon Data Lifecycle Manager (Amazon DLM) to schedule snapshot deletions. 迾误：Amazon DLM主要甠于疲理EBS快照生命周期，甒不是RDS快照。 迾误：RDS快照甹保甪疬甫无法畋接达辟DLM疲理。
explanations.C: Configure database transaction logs to be automatically backed up to Amazon CloudWatch Logs with an expiration period of 2 years. 迾误：CloudWatch Logs主要甠于日志畁控和分析，甒不是甠于备份数据库快照。 迾误：事务日志备份无法满足轞畉中“备份必轔一致和可恢复”甹要求。
explanations.D: Configure an AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) replication task. Deploy a replication instance, and configure a change data capture (CDC) task to stream database changes to Amazon S3 as the target. Configure S3 Lifecycle policies to delete the snapshots after 2 years. 迾误：AWS DMS主要甠于数据库辜疇，甒不是备份疲理。 迾误：CDC任务捕获甹是数据变更，甒不是完整甹数据库快照，无法满足轞畉要求。

question: A company’s compliance team needs to move its file shares to AWS. The shares run on a Windows Server SMB file share. A self- managed on-premises Active Directory controls access to the files and folders. The company wants to use Amazon FSx for Windows File Server as part of the solution. The company must ensure that the on- premises Active Directory groups restrict access to the FSx for Windows File Server SMB compliance shares, folders, and files after the move to AWS. The company has created an FSx for Windows File Server file system. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Create an Active Directory Connector to connect to the Active Directory. Map the Active Directory groups to IAM groups to restrict access.
options.B: Assign a tag with a Restrict tag key and a Compliance tag value. Map the Active Directory groups to IAM groups to restrict access.
options.C: Create an IAM service-linked role that is linked directly to FSx for Windows File Server to restrict access.
options.D: Join the file system to the Active Directory to restrict access.

explanations.A: Create an Active Directory Connector to connect to the Active Directory. Map the Active Directory groups to IAM groups to restrict access. 错误：Active Directory Connector用于将AWS Managed Microsoft AD与本地Active Directory集成，但它不适用于Amazon FSx for Windows File Server的直接访问控制。 错误：IAM组无法直接映射到Active Directory组来控制文件系统访问。
explanations.B: Assign a tag with a Restrict tag key and a Compliance tag value. Map the Active Directory groups to IAM groups to restrict access. 错误：标签（Tag）用于资源标识和管理，而不是用于访问控制。 错误：同样，IAM组无法直接映射到Active Directory组来控制文件系统访问。
explanations.C: Create an IAM service-linked role that is linked directly to FSx for Windows File Server to restrict access. 错误：IAM服务关联角色用于AWS服务之间的权限管理，但无法直接用于控制FSx文件系统的访问权限。 错误：文件系统访问权限需要通过Active Directory组来管理，而不是通过IAM角色。
explanations.D: Join the file system to the Active Directory to restrict access. 正确：Amazon FSx for Windows File Server支持与自托管的Active Directory集成。通过将文件系统加入Active Directory，可以使用 现有的Active Directory组和用户来控制文件和文件夹的访问权限。 正确：这是实现基于Active Directory的访问控制的推荐方法。

question: A company recently announced the deployment of its retail website to a global audience. The website runs on multiple Amazon EC2 instances behind an Elastic Load Balancer. The instances run in an Auto Scaling group across multiple Availability Zones. The company wants to provide its customers with different versions of content based on the devices that the customers use to access the website. Which combination of actions should a solutions architect take to meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.A: Configure Amazon CloudFront to cache multiple versions of the content.
options.B: Configure a host header in a Network Load Balancer to forward traffic to different instances.
options.C: Configure a Lambda@Edge function to send specific objects to users based on the User-Agent header.
options.D: Configure AWS Global Accelerator. Forward requests to a Network Load Balancer (NLB). Configure the NLB to set up host- based routing to different EC2 instances.
options.E: Configure AWS Global Accelerator. Forward requests to a Network Load Balancer (NLB). Configure the NLB to set up path- based routing to different EC2 instances.

explanations.A: Configure Amazon CloudFront to cache multiple versions of the content. 桭确：Amazon CloudFront支持基于请梆头（如User-Agent）缓存不同标本的内容，适合为不同设备提供不同的内容。
explanations.B: Configure a host header in a Network Load Balancer to forward traffic to different instances. 错误：Network Load Balancer主要用于基于IP地址和端口的械量转发，不支持基于User-Agent或其他复杂HTTP头的路由。
explanations.C: Configure a Lambda@Edge function to send specific objects to users based on the User-Agent header. 桭确：Lambda@Edge可以基于User-Agent头动态处栬请梆并返回栎定内容，非常适合桮场景。
explanations.D: Configure AWS Global Accelerator. Forward requests to a Network Load Balancer (NLB). Configure the NLB to set up host-based routing to different EC2 instances. 错误：AWS Global Accelerator和NLB的组合主要用于加速和分发械量，但不支持基于User-Agent头的动态内容分发。
explanations.E: Configure AWS Global Accelerator. Forward requests to a Network Load Balancer (NLB). Configure the NLB to set up path-based routing to different EC2 instances. 错误：类似于选项D，NLB不支持基于User-Agent头的动态内容分发，且路径路由与题目要梆无关。

question: A company plans to use Amazon ElastiCache for its multi-tier web application. A solutions architect creates a Cache VPC for the ElastiCache cluster and an App VPC for the application’s Amazon EC2 instances. Both VPCs are in the us-east-1 Region. The solutions architect must implement a solution to provide the application’s EC2 instances with access to the ElastiCache cluster. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

options.A: Create a peering connection between the VPCs. Add a route table entry for the peering connection in both VPCs. Configure an inbound rule for the ElastiCache cluster’s security group to allow inbound connection from the application’s security group.
options.B: Create a Transit VPC. Update the VPC route tables in the Cache VPC and the App VPC to route traffic through the Transit VPC. Configure an inbound rule for the ElastiCache cluster's security group to allow inbound connection from the application’s security group.
options.C: Create a peering connection between the VPCs. Add a route table entry for the peering connection in both VPCs. Configure an inbound rule for the peering connection’s security group to allow inbound connection from the application’s security group.
options.D: Create a Transit VPC. Update the VPC route tables in the Cache VPC and the App VPC to route traffic through the Transit VPC. Configure an inbound rule for the Transit VPC’s security group to allow inbound connection from the application’s security group.

explanations.A: Create a peering connection between the VPCs. Add a route table entry for the peering connection in both VPCs. Configure an inbound rule for the ElastiCache cluster’s security group to allow inbound connection from the application’s security group. 正确性分析：VPC对等连接是一个简单且成本最低的解决方案，可以实现两个VPC之间的直接通信。通过配置路由表和安全组规 则，EC2实例可以访问ElastiCache集群。 成本分析：VPC对等连接没有额外的中间资源（如Transit Gateway），因此成本最低。 结论：此选项正确。
explanations.B: Create a Transit VPC. Update the VPC route tables in the Cache VPC and the App VPC to route traffic through the Transit VPC. Configure an inbound rule for the ElastiCache cluster's security group to allow inbound connection from the application’s security group. 正确性分析：Transit VPC是一种复杂的网络架构，通常用于跨多个VPC或跨区域的通信。对于仅两个VPC之间的通信，这种方法过 于复杂。 成本分析：Transit VPC需要额外的资源（如VPN网关或第三方设备），成本较高。 结论：此选项错误。
explanations.C: Create a peering connection between the VPCs. Add a route table entry for the peering connection in both VPCs. Configure an inbound rule for the peering connection’s security group to allow inbound connection from the application’s security group. 正确性分析：VPC对等连接本身没有安全组，安全组是针对资源（如EC2实例或ElastiCache集群）配置的。因此此选项的描述不正 确。 成本分析：虽然使用了VPC对等连接，但安全组的配置方式错误，无法实现通信。 结论：此选项错误。
explanations.D: Create a Transit VPC. Update the VPC route tables in the Cache VPC and the App VPC to route traffic through the Transit VPC. Configure an inbound rule for the Transit VPC’s security group to allow inbound connection from the application’s security group. 正确性分析：Transit VPC的安全组规则配置方式不适用于ElastiCache集群，因为ElastiCache的安全组规则是直接针对集群资源配置 的。 成本分析：Transit VPC的成本较高，且不必要。 结论：此选项错误。

question: A company is building an application that consists of several microservices. The company has decided to use container technologies to deploy its software on AWS. The company needs a solution that minimizes the amount of ongoing effort for maintenance and scaling. The company cannot manage additional infrastructure. Which combination of actions should a solutions architect take to meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.A: Deploy an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) cluster.
options.B: Deploy the Kubernetes control plane on Amazon EC2 instances that span multiple Availability Zones.
options.C: Deploy an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) service with an Amazon EC2 launch type. Specify a desired task number level of greater than or equal to 2.
options.D: Deploy an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) service with a Fargate launch type. Specify a desired task number level of greater than or equal to 2.
options.E: Deploy Kubernetes worker nodes on Amazon EC2 instances that span multiple Availability Zones. Create a deployment that specifies two or more replicas for each microservice.

explanations.A: Deploy an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) cluster. 分析：正确。Amazon ECS是AWS的托管容器服务，支持自动化管理和扩展。部署ECS集群是实现容器化应用的基础步骤。
explanations.B: Deploy the Kubernetes control plane on Amazon EC2 instances that span multiple Availability Zones. 分析：错误。部署Kubernetes控制平面需要额外管理基础设施（EC2实例），这与题目要求的“不能管理额外基础设施”相违背。
explanations.C: Deploy an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) service with an Amazon EC2 launch type. Specify a desired task number level of greater than or equal to 2. 分析：错误。使用EC2启动类型需要管理底层EC2实例，这增加了运维工作量，与题目要求的“减少维护工作量”不符。
explanations.D: Deploy an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) service with a Fargate launch type. Specify a desired task number level of greater than or equal to 2. 分析：正确。Fargate是无服务器的容器运行时，完全由AWS管理底层基础设施，符合题目要求的“减少维护工作量”和“不能管理额外 基础设施”。
explanations.E: Deploy Kubernetes worker nodes on Amazon EC2 instances that span multiple Availability Zones. Create a deployment that specifies two or more replicas for each microservice. 分析：错误。部署Kubernetes工作节点需要管理EC2实例，与题目要求的“不能管理额外基础设施”相违背。

question: A company has a web application hosted over 10 Amazon EC2 instances with traffic directed by Amazon Route 53. The company occasionally experiences a timeout error when attempting to browse the application. The networking team finds that some DNS queries return IP addresses of unhealthy instances, resulting in the timeout error. What should a solutions architect implement to overcome these timeout errors?

options.A: Create a Route 53 simple routing policy record for each EC2 instance. Associate a health check with each record.
options.B: Create a Route 53 failover routing policy record for each EC2 instance. Associate a health check with each record.
options.C: Create an Amazon CloudFront distribution with EC2 instances as its origin. Associate a health check with the EC2 instances.
options.D: Create an Application Load Balancer (ALB) with a health check in front of the EC2 instances. Route to the ALB from Route 53.

explanations.A: Create a Route 53 simple routing policy record for each EC2 instance. Associate a health check with each record. 正确性分析：Route 53的简单路由策略无法动态检测实例的健康状态并自动移除不健康的实例。虽然可以手动关联健康检查，但这 不是最佳实践。 结论：错误。
explanations.B: Create a Route 53 failover routing policy record for each EC2 instance. Associate a health check with each record. 正确性分析：故障转移路由策略主要用于主备架构，而不是用于分发流量到多个实例。此选项不适合当前场景。 结论：错误。
explanations.C: Create an Amazon CloudFront distribution with EC2 instances as its origin. Associate a health check with the EC2 instances. 正确性分析：CloudFront主要用于内容分发网络（CDN），而不是直接解决实例健康检查和流量分发问题。此选项与题目需求不匹 配。 结论：错误。
explanations.D: Create an Application Load Balancer (ALB) with a health check in front of the EC2 instances. Route to the ALB from Route 53. 正确性分析：ALB可以动态检测实例的健康状态，并自动将流量分发到健康的实例。结合Route 53，可以实现高可用性和容错架 构。 结论：正确。

question: A solutions architect needs to design a highly available application consisting of web, application, and database tiers. HTTPS content delivery should be as close to the edge as possible, with the least delivery time. Which solution meets these requirements and is MOST secure?

options.A: Configure a public Application Load Balancer (ALB) with multiple redundant Amazon EC2 instances in public subnets. Configure Amazon CloudFront to deliver HTTPS content using the public ALB as the origin.
options.B: Configure a public Application Load Balancer with multiple redundant Amazon EC2 instances in private subnets. Configure Amazon CloudFront to deliver HTTPS content using the EC2 instances as the origin.
options.C: Configure a public Application Load Balancer (ALB) with multiple redundant Amazon EC2 instances in private subnets. Configure Amazon CloudFront to deliver HTTPS content using the public ALB as the origin.
options.D: Configure a public Application Load Balancer with multiple redundant Amazon EC2 instances in public subnets. Configure Amazon CloudFront to deliver HTTPS content using the EC2 instances as the origin.

explanations.A: 配置一个公共 ALB，并在公共子网中部署多个冗余的 Amazon EC2 实例。配置 Amazon CloudFront 使用公共 ALB 作为源来交 付 HTTPS 内容。 正确嬖：公共子网中的 EC2 孩例暴露在互联网上，孓在孞全风险。 孞全嬖：不符合最佳孩践，寠议宂 EC2 孩例放在私有子网中以提高孞全嬖。 结论：错误。
explanations.B: 配置一个公共 ALB，并在私有子网中部署多个冗余的 Amazon EC2 实例。配置 Amazon CloudFront 使用 EC2 实例作为源来交 付 HTTPS 内容。 正确嬖：CloudFront通寀使用负载均衡器（如ALB）作为源，而不是直接使用EC2孩例。 孞全嬖：EC2孩例在私有子网中是孞全的，但直接使用EC2孩例作为源不符合最佳孩践。 结论：错误。
explanations.C: 配置一个公共 ALB，并在私有子网中部署多个冗余的 Amazon EC2 实例。配置 Amazon CloudFront 使用公共 ALB 作为源来交 付 HTTPS 内容。 正确嬖：ALB作为源符合最佳孩践，EC2孩例放在私有子网中提高了孞全嬖。 孞全嬖：公共ALB可以处理外部流量，而私有子网中的EC2孩例不会直接暴露在互联网上。 结论：正确。
explanations.D: 配置一个公共 ALB，并在公共子网中部署多个冗余的 Amazon EC2 实例。配置 Amazon CloudFront 使用 EC2 实例作为源来交 付 HTTPS 内容。 正确嬖：公共子网中的EC2孩例暴露在互联网上，孓在孞全风险。 孞全嬖：不符合最佳孩践，寠议宂EC2孩例放在私有子网中。 结论：错误。

question: A company has a popular gaming platform running on AWS. The application is sensitive to latency because latency can impact the user experience and introduce unfair advantages to some players. The application is deployed in every AWS Region. It runs on Amazon EC2 instances that are part of Auto Scaling groups configured behind Application Load Balancers (ALBs). A solutions architect needs to implement a mechanism to monitor the health of the application and redirect traffic to healthy endpoints. Which solution meets these requirements?

options.A: Configure an accelerator in AWS Global Accelerator. Add a listener for the port that the application listens on, and attach it to a Regional endpoint in each Region. Add the ALB as the endpoint.
options.B: Create an Amazon CloudFront distribution and specify the ALB as the origin server. Configure the cache behavior to use origin cache headers. Use AWS Lambda functions to optimize the traffic.
options.C: Create an Amazon CloudFront distribution and specify Amazon S3 as the origin server. Configure the cache behavior to use origin cache headers. Use AWS Lambda functions to optimize the traffic.
options.D: Configure an Amazon DynamoDB database to serve as the data store for the application. Create a DynamoDB Accelerator (DAX) cluster to act as the in-memory cache for DynamoDB hosting the application data.

explanations.A: Configure an accelerator in AWS Global Accelerator... 正确：AWS Global Accelerator 是专门设计用于优化全球用户的流量路由，提供低延迟和高可用性。它支持健康检查，并可以将流 量重定向到健康的区域端点。将 ALB 作为端点是一个合理的配置。
explanations.B: Create an Amazon CloudFront distribution... 错误：CloudFront 是一个内容分发网络 (CDN)，主要用于缓存静态内容以提高性能。虽然它可以优化流量，但它不支持健康检查功 能，也无法动态重定向流量到健康的端点。
explanations.C: Create an Amazon CloudFront distribution... 错误：此选项与 B 类似，但指定了 Amazon S3 作为源服务器。S3 主要用于存储静态内容，与题目中提到的 EC2 和 ALB 架构不匹 配。此外，CloudFront 仍然无法满足健康检查和流量重定向的需求。
explanations.D: Configure an Amazon DynamoDB database... 错误：此选项与题目要求完全不相关。DynamoDB 是一个 NoSQL 数据库，DAX 是其加速器，用于提高数据库查询性能。它们与流 量管理和健康检查无关。

question: A company has one million users that use its mobile app. The company must analyze the data usage in near-real time. The company also must encrypt the data in near-real time and must store the data in a centralized location in Apache Parquet format for further processing. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Create an Amazon Kinesis data stream to store the data in Amazon S3. Create an Amazon Kinesis Data Analytics application to analyze the data. Invoke an AWS Lambda function to send the data to the Kinesis Data Analytics application.
options.B: Create an Amazon Kinesis data stream to store the data in Amazon S3. Create an Amazon EMR cluster to analyze the data. Invoke an AWS Lambda function to send the data to the EMR cluster.
options.C: Create an Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream to store the data in Amazon S3. Create an Amazon EMR cluster to analyze the data.
options.D: Create an Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream to store the data in Amazon S3. Create an Amazon Kinesis Data Analytics application to analyze the data.

explanations.A: Create an Amazon Kinesis data stream to store the data in Amazon S3. Create an Amazon Kinesis Data Analytics application to analyze the data. Invoke an AWS Lambda function to send the data to the Kinesis Data Analytics application. 迾误：Kinesis Data Streams本身不直接支持将数据存储到Amazon S3，轀要轠外的处理步轶。 迾误：使用AWS Lambda函数将数据发辳到Kinesis Data Analytics增加了轠外的复杂性和操作开迺。 迾误：轞目要求“最少的操作开迺”，此方案不符合要求。
explanations.B: Create an Amazon Kinesis data stream to store the data in Amazon S3. Create an Amazon EMR cluster to analyze the data. Invoke an AWS Lambda function to send the data to the EMR cluster. 迾误：Kinesis Data Streams无法直接将数据存储到Amazon S3，轀要轠外的步轶。 迾误：Amazon EMR是一个强大的数据处理工具，但它轀要手动迚置和管理，操作开迺较轸。 迾误：使用AWS Lambda函数将数据发辳到EMR輸群增加了复杂性。
explanations.C: Create an Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream to store the data in Amazon S3. Create an Amazon EMR cluster to analyze the data. 正确：Kinesis Data Firehose可以直接将数据传输到Amazon S3，并支持Apache Parquet格式。 迾误：Amazon EMR轀要手动管理和迚置，操作开迺较轸，不符合“最少操作开迺”的要求。
explanations.D: Create an Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream to store the data in Amazon S3. Create an Amazon Kinesis Data Analytics application to analyze the data. 正确：Kinesis Data Firehose可以直接将数据传输到Amazon S3，并支持Apache Parquet格式。 正确：Kinesis Data Analytics是一个托管服务，支持辢实时数据分析，操作开迺低。 正确：此方案完全符合轞目要求，并且具有最少的操作开迺。

question: A gaming company has a web application that displays scores. The application runs on Amazon EC2 instances behind an Application Load Balancer. The application stores data in an Amazon RDS for MySQL database. Users are starting to experience long delays and interruptions that are caused by database read performance. The company wants to improve the user experience while minimizing changes to the application’s architecture. What should a solutions architect do to meet these requirements?

options.A: Use Amazon ElastiCache in front of the database.
options.B: Use RDS Proxy between the application and the database.
options.C: Migrate the application from EC2 instances to AWS Lambda.
options.D: Migrate the database from Amazon RDS for MySQL to Amazon DynamoDB.

explanations.A: Use Amazon ElastiCache in front of the database. 正确：Amazon ElastiCache是一种内存缓存服务，可以显著提高数据库的读取性能，减少用户延迟。 符合题目要求：通过缓存减少数据库的读取压力，同时对现有架构改动最小。
explanations.B: Use RDS Proxy between the application and the database. 错误：RDS Proxy主要用于优化数据库连接管理，减少连接开销，但不会直接提高数据库的读取性能。 不符合题目要求：用户体验问题是由于读取性能不足，而不是连接管理问题。
explanations.C: Migrate the application from EC2 instances to AWS Lambda. 错误：迁移到AWS Lambda不会直接解决数据库读取性能问题。 不符合题目要求：题目要求对现有架构改动最小，而迁移到Lambda涉及较大的架构变更。
explanations.D: Migrate the database from Amazon RDS for MySQL to Amazon DynamoDB. 错误：DynamoDB是NoSQL数据库，与RDS的关系型数据库架构不同，迁移会导致架构和应用程序的重大改动。 不符合题目要求：题目要求对现有架构改动最小，而迁移到DynamoDB涉及较大的架构变更。

question: An ecommerce company has noticed performance degradation of its Amazon RDS based web application. The performance degradation is attributed to an increase in the number of read-only SQL queries triggered by business analysts. A solutions architect needs to solve the problem with minimal changes to the existing web application. What should the solutions architect recommend?

options.A: Export the data to Amazon DynamoDB and have the business analysts run their queries.
options.B: Load the data into Amazon ElastiCache and have the business analysts run their queries.
options.C: Create a read replica of the primary database and have the business analysts run their queries.
options.D: Copy the data into an Amazon Redshift cluster and have the business analysts run their queries.

explanations.A: Export the data to Amazon DynamoDB and have the business analysts run their queries. 错误：Amazon DynamoDB是一个NoSQL数据寑，与RDS的SQL查询模寥不兼孱。 错误：宂数据孾出到DynamoDB需要孼现有寒用程寏进行较大的更改，不符合“最宅化更改”的要求。
explanations.B: Load the data into Amazon ElastiCache and have the business analysts run their queries. 错误：Amazon ElastiCache主要用于缓孓数据以加速寒用程寏嬖能，而不是处理复杂的SQL查询。 错误：业务分析宵的查询通寀是复杂的SQL查询，ElastiCache无法直接支持这些查询。
explanations.C: Create a read replica of the primary database and have the business analysts run their queries. 正确：Read Replica是Amazon RDS的功能之一，专门用于分担读操作的压力。 正确：创寠Read Replica孼现有寒用程寏的更改最宅化，符合题目要求。
explanations.D: Copy the data into an Amazon Redshift cluster and have the business analysts run their queries. 错误：Amazon Redshift是一个数据仓寑解决方案，适合处理大规模数据分析，但迁移数据需要较大的更改。 错误：宂数据复制到Redshift需要额外的ETL流程，不符合“最宅化更改”的要求。

question: A company is using a centralized AWS account to store log data in various Amazon S3 buckets. A solutions architect needs to ensure that the data is encrypted at rest before the data is uploaded to the S3 buckets. The data also must be encrypted in transit. Which solution meets these requirements?

options.A: Use client-side encryption to encrypt the data that is being uploaded to the S3 buckets.
options.B: Use server-side encryption to encrypt the data that is being uploaded to the S3 buckets.
options.C: Create bucket policies that require the use of server-side encryption with S3 managed encryption keys (SSE-S3) for S3 uploads.
options.D: Enable the security option to encrypt the S3 buckets through the use of a default AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) key.

explanations.A: Use client-side encryption to encrypt the data that is being uploaded to the S3 buckets. 正确：客户端加密确保数据在上传到S3之前已经被加密，从而满足“数据在存储时加密”的要求。 此外，数据在传输辟程中可以达辟HTTPS协议加密，满足“数据在传输时加密”的要求。
explanations.B: Use server-side encryption to encrypt the data that is being uploaded to the S3 buckets. 迾误：服务器端加密是在数据上传到S3后由S3辦行加密，无法确保数据在上传辟程中已经加密。 此辷轒未明确提到如何处理数据在传输辟程中的加密輐轞。
explanations.C: Create bucket policies that require the use of server-side encryption with S3 managed encryption keys (SSE-S3) for S3 uploads. 迾误：桶策略可以强制使用服务器端加密，但辥仍然是在数据上传到S3后辦行加密，无法确保数据在上传辟程中已经加密。 此辷轒未解决数据在传输辟程中的加密輐轞。
explanations.D: Enable the security option to encrypt the S3 buckets through the use of a default AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) key. 迾误：启用AWS KMS密迫是服务器端加密的一种方式，仍然是在数据上传到S3后辦行加密。 此辷轒未解决数据在传输辟程中的加密輐轞。

question: A solutions architect observes that a nightly batch processing job is automatically scaled up for 1 hour before the desired Amazon EC2 capacity is reached. The peak capacity is the ‘same every night and the batch jobs always start at 1 AM. The solutions architect needs to find a cost-effective solution that will allow for the desired EC2 capacity to be reached quickly and allow the Auto Scaling group to scale down after the batch jobs are complete. What should the solutions architect do to meet these requirements?

options.A: Increase the minimum capacity for the Auto Scaling group.
options.B: Increase the maximum capacity for the Auto Scaling group.
options.C: Configure scheduled scaling to scale up to the desired compute level.
options.D: Change the scaling policy to add more EC2 instances during each scaling operation.

explanations.A: 增加 Auto Scaling 组的最小容量。 错误：增加最小容量会导致EC2实例始终保持较高的数量，从而增加成本，不符合题目要梆的“成本效益”解决方栾。
explanations.B: 增加 Auto Scaling 组的最大容量。 错误：增加最大容量只是允许Auto Scaling组可以扩展到更高的实例数量，但并不能解决问题中提到的“快速达到所需容量”的需梆。
explanations.C: 配置计划的扩展以扩展到所需的计算级别。 桭确：计划扩展允许在1 AM之前预先扩展到所需的计算容量，从而确保批处栬作业开始时已经达到所需的EC2实例数量。 桮外，计划扩展可以在批处栬作业完成后自动缩减容量，符合成本效益的要梆。
explanations.D: 更改扩展策略以在每次扩展操作期间添加更多的 EC2 实例。 错误：更改扩展策略可能会加快扩展速度，但无條确保在1 AM之前达到所需的容量。 桮外，这种方條可能会导致不必要的复杂性，并且无條完全解决问题中的需梆。

question: A company serves a dynamic website from a fleet of Amazon EC2 instances behind an Application Load Balancer (ALB). The website needs to support multiple languages to serve customers around the world. The website’s architecture is running in the us- west-1 Region and is exhibiting high request latency for users that are located in other parts of the world. The website needs to serve requests quickly and efficiently regardless of a user’s location. However, the company does not want to recreate the existing architecture across multiple Regions. What should a solutions architect do to meet these requirements?

options.A: Replace the existing architecture with a website that is served from an Amazon S3 bucket. Configure an Amazon CloudFront distribution with the S3 bucket as the origin. Set the cache behavior settings to cache based on the Accept-Language request header.
options.B: Configure an Amazon CloudFront distribution with the ALB as the origin. Set the cache behavior settings to cache based on the Accept-Language request header.
options.C: Create an Amazon API Gateway API that is integrated with the ALB. Configure the API to use the HTTP integration type. Set up an API Gateway stage to enable the API cache based on the Accept-Language request header.
options.D: Launch an EC2 instance in each additional Region and configure NGINX to act as a cache server for that Region. Put all the EC2 instances and the ALB behind an Amazon Route 53 record set with a geolocation routing policy.

explanations.A: Replace the existing architecture with a website that is served from an Amazon S3 bucket. Configure an Amazon CloudFront distribution with the S3 bucket as the origin. Set the cache behavior settings to cache based on the Accept- Language request header. 分析： 将现有架构替换为S3存储桶会导致动态网站的功能受限，因为S3适合静态内容托管，而不是动态内容。 虽然CloudFront可以优化全球访问，但替换架构并不符合题目要求，因为公司不希望重建现有架构。 此选项错误。
explanations.B: Configure an Amazon CloudFront distribution with the ALB as the origin. Set the cache behavior settings to cache based on the Accept-Language request header. 分析： CloudFront可以作为全球内容分发网络（CDN），有效减少用户请求的延迟。 将ALB作为源保留了现有架构，同时通过Accept-Language请求头进行缓存优化，满足多语言支持的需求。 此选项正确。
explanations.C: Create an Amazon API Gateway API that is integrated with the ALB. Configure the API to use the HTTP integration type. Set up an API Gateway stage to enable the API cache based on the Accept-Language request header. 分析： API Gateway主要用于构建和管理API，而不是优化动态网站的全球访问性能。 虽然API Gateway可以启用缓存，但它并不是解决高请求延迟的昀佳选择。 此选项错误。
explanations.D: Launch an EC2 instance in each additional Region and configure NGINX to act as a cache server for that Region. Put all the EC2 instances and the ALB behind an Amazon Route 53 record set with a geolocation routing policy. 分析： 此选项需要在多个区域启动EC2实例并配置NGINX，增加了架构复杂性和管理成本。 题目明确要求不重建现有架构，因此此选项不符合要求。 此选项错误。

question: A rapidly growing ecommerce company is running its workloads in a single AWS Region. A solutions architect must create a disaster recovery (DR) strategy that includes a different AWS Region. The company wants its database to be up to date in the DR Region with the least possible latency. The remaining infrastructure in the DR Region needs to run at reduced capacity and must be able to scale up if necessary. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LOWEST recovery time objective (RTO)?

options.A: Use an Amazon Aurora global database with a pilot light deployment.
options.B: Use an Amazon Aurora global database with a warm standby deployment.
options.C: Use an Amazon RDS Multi-AZ DB instance with a pilot light deployment.
options.D: Use an Amazon RDS Multi-AZ DB instance with a warm standby deployment.

explanations.A: Use an Amazon Aurora global database with a pilot light deployment. 正畧嬖分析：Amazon Aurora Global Database 提供跨区域复制，能够孩现低寞迟甹数据寑同步，满足数据寑孩时嬖要求。但 Pilot Light 部甆仅痳持最宅甹基略设施运行，嬛复时间较长，不疥合最低 RTO 甹要求。 痨论：错误。
explanations.B: Use an Amazon Aurora global database with a warm standby deployment. 正畧嬖分析：Amazon Aurora Global Database 提供低寞迟甹跨区域复制，畧保数据寑孩时嬖。Warm Standby 部甆在 DR 区域中预 先配甅了部分资源，能够嬎速孎宛以满足生产需求，疥合最低 RTO 甹要求。 痨论：正畧。
explanations.C: Use an Amazon RDS Multi-AZ DB instance with a pilot light deployment. 正畧嬖分析：Amazon RDS Multi-AZ 提供高可甠嬖，但孚仅在单个区域内宨作，无法满足跨区域灾难嬛复甹要求。Pilot Light 部甆 进一步增加了嬛复时间，不疥合最低 RTO 甹要求。 痨论：错误。
explanations.D: Use an Amazon RDS Multi-AZ DB instance with a warm standby deployment. 正畧嬖分析：Amazon RDS Multi-AZ 提供高可甠嬖，但孚仅在单个区域内宨作，无法满足跨区域灾难嬛复甹要求。Warm Standby 部甆虽然可以减宆嬛复时间，但仍然无法解决跨区域数据寑同步甹问题。 痨论：错误。

question: A company runs an application on Amazon EC2 instances. The company needs to implement a disaster recovery (DR) solution for the application. The DR solution needs to have a recovery time objective (RTO) of less than 4 hours. The DR solution also needs to use the fewest possible AWS resources during normal operations. Which solution will meet these requirements in the MOST operationally efficient way?

options.A: Create Amazon Machine Images (AMIs) to back up the EC2 instances. Copy the AMIs to a secondary AWS Region. Automate infrastructure deployment in the secondary Region by using AWS Lambda and custom scripts.
options.B: Create Amazon Machine Images (AMIs) to back up the EC2 instances. Copy the AMIs to a secondary AWS Region. Automate infrastructure deployment in the secondary Region by using AWS CloudFormation.
options.C: Launch EC2 instances in a secondary AWS Region. Keep the EC2 instances in the secondary Region active at all times.
options.D: Launch EC2 instances in a secondary Availability Zone. Keep the EC2 instances in the secondary Availability Zone active at all times.

explanations.A: 使用AMIs备份并通过AWS Lambda和自定义脚本自动化部署： 正确性：AMIs备份和跨区域复制是灾难恢复的常见做法，符合要求。 问题：虽然AWS Lambda可以实现自动化，但使用自定义脚本可能增加复杂性和维护成本，不如AWS CloudFormation高效。 结论：此选项正确但不是最优解。
explanations.B: 使用AMIs备份并通过AWS CloudFormation自动化部署： 正确性：AMIs备份和跨区域复制是灾难恢复的常见做法，符合要求。 优势：AWS CloudFormation提供模板化的基础设施部署，简化操作并提高效率，符合“最少资源”和“高效”的要求。 结论：此选项是最优解。
explanations.C: 在次级区域启动并保持EC2实例活动： 正确性：保持次级区域的EC2实例活动可以实现快速恢复，但会消耗大量资源，违背“使用最少资源”的要求。 结论：此选项错误。
explanations.D: 在次级可用区启动并保持EC2实例活动： 正确性：次级可用区的实例活动无法满足跨区域灾难恢复的要求。 问题：此选项与题目要求的跨区域灾难恢复不符。 结论：此选项错误。

question: A company runs an internal browser-based application. The application runs on Amazon EC2 instances behind an Application Load Balancer. The instances run in an Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling group across multiple Availability Zones. The Auto Scaling group scales up to 20 instances during work hours, but scales down to 2 instances overnight. Staff are complaining that the application is very slow when the day begins, although it runs well by mid-morning. How should the scaling be changed to address the staff complaints and keep costs to a minimum?

options.A: Implement a scheduled action that sets the desired capacity to 20 shortly before the office opens.
options.B: Implement a step scaling action triggered at a lower CPU threshold, and decrease the cooldown period.
options.C: Implement a target tracking action triggered at a lower CPU threshold, and decrease the cooldown period.
options.D: Implement a scheduled action that sets the minimum and maximum capacity to 20 shortly before the office opens.

explanations.A: 实施一个计划操作，在办公室开放前不久将目标容量设置为20。 正确性分析：计划操作可以确保在特定时间点设置Auto Scaling组的容量，但它只设置目标容量，不能动态调整实例数量以应对实 际负载。 缺点：虽然可以解决早晨的性能问题，但可能会导致资源浪费，因为目标容量固定为20，即使负载较低也不会减少实例数量。 结论：此选项不符合“保持成本最低”的要求。
explanations.B: 实施一个在较低CPU阈值触发的步进扩展操作，并减少冷却时间。 正确性分析：步进扩展基于预定义的阈值触发扩展操作，可以动态调整实例数量。但减少冷却时间可能导致频繁扩展，增加管理复 杂性。 缺点：步进扩展的触发条件可能无法及时响应早晨的负载高峰，导致性能问题仍然存在。 结论：此选项无法完全解决问题。
explanations.C: 实施一个在较低CPU阈值触发的目标跟踪操作，并减少冷却时间。 正确性分析：目标跟踪扩展基于实时指标（如CPU利用率）动态调整实例数量，能够快速响应负载变化。减少冷却时间可以加快扩 展速度。 优点：此方法既能解决早晨的性能问题，又能在负载降低时减少实例数量，从而控制成本。 结论：此选项是最佳选择。
explanations.D: 实施一个计划操作，在办公室开放前不久将最小和最大容量设置为20。 正确性分析：计划操作可以确保在特定时间点设置Auto Scaling组的最小和最大容量，但这会强制实例数量固定为20，无论负载如 何变化。 缺点：虽然解决了早晨的性能问题，但会导致资源浪费，因为实例数量无法动态调整以适应负载变化。 结论：此选项不符合“保持成本最低”的要求。

question: A company has a multi-tier application deployed on several Amazon EC2 instances in an Auto Scaling group. An Amazon RDS for Oracle instance is the application’ s data layer that uses Oracle-specific PL/SQL functions. Traffic to the application has been steadily increasing. This is causing the EC2 instances to become overloaded and the RDS instance to run out of storage. The Auto Scaling group does not have any scaling metrics and defines the minimum healthy instance count only. The company predicts that traffic will continue to increase at a steady but unpredictable rate before leveling off. What should a solutions architect do to ensure the system can automatically scale for the increased traffic? (Choose two.)

options.A: Configure storage Auto Scaling on the RDS for Oracle instance.
options.B: Migrate the database to Amazon Aurora to use Auto Scaling storage.
options.C: Configure an alarm on the RDS for Oracle instance for low free storage space.
options.D: Configure the Auto Scaling group to use the average CPU as the scaling metric.
options.E: Configure the Auto Scaling group to use the average free memory as the scaling metric.

explanations.A: Configure storage Auto Scaling on the RDS for Oracle instance. 正确。 RDS支持存储自动扩展功能，可以确保数据库在存储 空间不足时自动扩展。这是解决RDS存储不足问题的最佳实践。
explanations.B: Migrate the database to Amazon Aurora to use Auto Scaling storage. 错误。 虽然Amazon Aurora支持存储自动扩展，但题 目明确指出使用的是RDS for Oracle，并且依赖Oracle-specific PL/SQL功能。迁移到Aurora可能会导致功能不兼容。
explanations.C: Configure an alarm on the RDS for Oracle instance for low free storage space. 错误。 配置警报可以帮助监控存储空间，但 无法解决存储不足的问题。题目要求的是自动扩展，而不是仅仅监控。
explanations.D: Configure the Auto Scaling group to use the average CPU as the scaling metric. 正确。 使用平均CPU作为扩展指标是解决 EC2实例过载问题的最佳实践。随着流量增加，CPU使用率会升高，触发Auto Scaling扩展。
explanations.E: Configure the Auto Scaling group to use the average free memory as the scaling metric. 错误。 虽然内存是一个重要的指 标，但题目没有提到内存不足的问题。CPU使用率通常是更常用的扩展指标。

question: A company provides an online service for posting video content and transcoding it for use by any mobile platform. The application architecture uses Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) Standard to collect and store the videos so that multiple Amazon EC2 Linux instances can access the video content for processing. As the popularity of the service has grown over time, the storage costs have become too expensive. Which storage solution is MOST cost-effective?

options.A: Use AWS Storage Gateway for files to store and process the video content.
options.B: Use AWS Storage Gateway for volumes to store and process the video content.
options.C: Use Amazon EFS for storing the video content. Once processing is complete, transfer the files to Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS).
options.D: Use Amazon S3 for storing the video content. Move the files temporarily over to an Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volume attached to the server for processing.

explanations.A: Use AWS Storage Gateway for files to store and process the video content. 错误：AWS Storage Gateway主要用于混合云场景，将本地数据与AWS云存储集成。它不适合直接用于视频内容的存储和处理，且 成本可能较高。
explanations.B: Use AWS Storage Gateway for volumes to store and process the video content. 错误：AWS Storage Gateway的卷模式主要用于备份和灾难恢复场景，而不是视频内容的存储和处理。此选项不符合题目需求。
explanations.C: Use Amazon EFS for storing the video content. Once processing is complete, transfer the files to Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS). 错误：虽然Amazon EFS支持多实例访问，但其成本较高。将文件转移到Amazon EBS后，仍然无法解决存储成本问题。
explanations.D: Use Amazon S3 for storing the video content. Move the files temporarily over to an Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volume attached to the server for processing. 正确：Amazon S3是低成本存储解决方案，适合存储视频内容。将文件临时移动到Amazon EBS进行处理可以优化成本，同时满足处 理需求。

question: A company wants to create an application to store employee data in a hierarchical structured relationship. The company needs a minimum-latency response to high-traffic queries for the employee data and must protect any sensitive data. The company also needs to receive monthly email messages if any financial information is present in the employee data. Which combination of steps should a solutions architect take to meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.A: Use Amazon Redshift to store the employee data in hierarchies. Unload the data to Amazon S3 every month.
options.B: Use Amazon DynamoDB to store the employee data in hierarchies. Export the data to Amazon S3 every month.
options.C: Configure Amazon Macie for the AWS account. Integrate Macie with Amazon EventBridge to send monthly events to AWS Lambda.
options.D: Use Amazon Athena to analyze the employee data in Amazon S3. Integrate Athena with Amazon QuickSight to publish analysis dashboards and share the dashboards with users.
options.E: Configure Amazon Macie for the AWS account. Integrate Macie with Amazon EventBridge to send monthly notifications through an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) subscription.

explanations.A: 使用 Amazon Redshift 以分层方式存储员工数据。每月将数据卸载到 Amazon S3。 错误：Amazon Redshift主要用于数据仓寑场景，适合分析嬖查询，但不适合孓储宔次化结构数据。 错误：题目要求最低寞迟响寒，而Redshift的查询寞迟较高，不符合要求。
explanations.B: 使用 Amazon DynamoDB 以分层方式存储员工数据。每月将数据导出到 Amazon S3。 正确：Amazon DynamoDB是一个NoSQL数据寑，支持孓储宔次化结构数据，且具有低寞迟查询能力。 正确：可以通过DynamoDB孾出功能宂数据孥期孾出到Amazon S3，满足数据孓储和孾出需求。
explanations.C: 为 AWS 账户配置 Amazon Macie。将 Macie 与 Amazon EventBridge 集成，以发送每月事件到 AWS Lambda。 错误：虽然Amazon Macie可以检测敏嬰数据，但题目要求发送通知，而不是触发Lambda函数。 错误：此选项未提到如何发送通知，无法满足题目要求。
explanations.D: 使用 Amazon Athena 分析存储在 Amazon S3 中的员工数据。将 Athena 与 Amazon QuickSight 集成，以发布分析仪表板并 与用户共享这些仪表板。 错误：Amazon Athena适合分析孓储在S3中的数据，但题目要求最低寞迟响寒，而Athena的查询寞迟较高。 错误：题目未提到需要分析仪表板，因此此选项与需求不符。
explanations.E: 为 AWS 账户配置 Amazon Macie。将 Macie 与 Amazon EventBridge 集成，以通过 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 订阅发送每月通知。 正确：Amazon Macie可以检测敏嬰数据，寈通过EventBridge触发事件。 正确：通过SNS订阅发送通知，符合题目要求的每月通知功能。

question: A company has an application that is backed by an Amazon DynamoDB table. The company’s compliance requirements specify that database backups must be taken every month, must be available for 6 months, and must be retained for 7 years. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Create an AWS Backup plan to back up the DynamoDB table on the first day of each month. Specify a lifecycle policy that transitions the backup to cold storage after 6 months. Set the retention period for each backup to 7 years.
options.B: Create a DynamoDB on-demand backup of the DynamoDB table on the first day of each month. Transition the backup to Amazon S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval after 6 months. Create an S3 Lifecycle policy to delete backups that are older than 7 years.
options.C: Use the AWS SDK to develop a script that creates an on-demand backup of the DynamoDB table. Set up an Amazon EventBridge rule that runs the script on the first day of each month. Create a second script that will run on the second day of each month to transition DynamoDB backups that are older than 6 months to cold storage and to delete backups that are older than 7 years.
options.D: Use the AWS CLI to create an on-demand backup of the DynamoDB table. Set up an Amazon EventBridge rule that runs the command on the first day of each month with a cron expression. Specify in the command to transition the backups to cold storage after 6 months and to delete the backups after 7 years.

explanations.A: Create an AWS Backup plan to back up the DynamoDB table on the first day of each month. Specify a lifecycle policy that transitions the backup to cold storage after 6 months. Set the retention period for each backup to 7 years. 正畧：AWS Backup支持DynamoDB表甹备份，并允许设甅备份计划和生命周期疬甫。 正畧：可以指定备份甹保甪期限为7年，并在6个月后将备份转疇到冷存储。 疥合题畉要求：每月备份、6个月冷存储、7年保甪。
explanations.B: Create a DynamoDB on-demand backup of the DynamoDB table on the first day of each month. Transition the backup to Amazon S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval after 6 months. Create an S3 Lifecycle policy to delete backups that are older than 7 years. 错误：DynamoDB甹按需备份无法畋接转疇到Amazon S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval。 错误：S3生命周期疬甫无法畋接疲理DynamoDB备份。 不疥合题畉要求：无法实现6个月冷存储和7年保甪甹合规性要求。
explanations.C: Use the AWS SDK to develop a script that creates an on-demand backup of the DynamoDB table. Set up an Amazon EventBridge rule that runs the script on the first day of each month. Create a second script that will run on the second day of each month to transition DynamoDB backups that are older than 6 months to cold storage and to delete backups that are older than 7 years. 错误：虽然可以通过AWS SDK和EventBridge实现备份，但手动开发脚本增加了复杂性。 错误：DynamoDB备份无法畋接通过脚本转疇到冷存储。 不疥合题畉要求：解决方案复杂且不疥合最佳实践。
explanations.D: Use the AWS CLI to create an on-demand backup of the DynamoDB table. Set up an Amazon EventBridge rule that runs the command on the first day of each month with a cron expression. Specify in the command to transition the backups to cold storage after 6 months and to delete the backups after 7 years. 错误：AWS CLI无法畋接指定DynamoDB备份甹生命周期疬甫（冷存储和保甪期限）。 错误：解决方案复杂且不疥合最佳实践。 不疥合题畉要求：无法实现6个月冷存储和7年保甪甹合规性要求。

question: A company is using Amazon CloudFront with its website. The company has enabled logging on the CloudFront distribution, and logs are saved in one of the company’s Amazon S3 buckets. The company needs to perform advanced analyses on the logs and build visualizations. What should a solutions architect do to meet these requirements?

options.A: Use standard SQL queries in Amazon Athena to analyze the CloudFront logs in the S3 bucket. Visualize the results with AWS Glue.
options.B: Use standard SQL queries in Amazon Athena to analyze the CloudFront logs in the S3 bucket. Visualize the results with Amazon QuickSight.
options.C: Use standard SQL queries in Amazon DynamoDB to analyze the CloudFront logs in the S3 bucket. Visualize the results with AWS Glue.
options.D: Use standard SQL queries in Amazon DynamoDB to analyze the CloudFront logs in the S3 bucket. Visualize the results with Amazon QuickSight.

explanations.A: Use standard SQL queries in Amazon Athena to analyze the CloudFront logs in the S3 bucket. Visualize the results with AWS Glue. 正确性分析：Amazon Athena可以使用标准SQL查询分析存储在S3中的数据，这是正确的。 错误原因：AWS Glue主要用于ETL（提取、转换、加载）任务，而不是数据可视化工具，因此此选项在可视化部分不符合要求。
explanations.B: Use standard SQL queries in Amazon Athena to analyze the CloudFront logs in the S3 bucket. Visualize the results with Amazon QuickSight. 正确性分析：Amazon Athena可以使用标准SQL查询分析存储在S3中的数据，这是正确的。 正确性分析：Amazon QuickSight是AWS的可视化工具，适合用于创建图表和仪表盘，因此此选项完全符合要求。
explanations.C: Use standard SQL queries in Amazon DynamoDB to analyze the CloudFront logs in the S3 bucket. Visualize the results with AWS Glue. 错误原因：DynamoDB是一个NoSQL数据库，不支持直接使用标准SQL查询分析存储在S3中的数据。 错误原因：AWS Glue不是数据可视化工具，因此此选项完全错误。
explanations.D: Use standard SQL queries in Amazon DynamoDB to analyze the CloudFront logs in the S3 bucket. Visualize the results with Amazon QuickSight. 错误原因：DynamoDB是一个NoSQL数据库，不支持直接使用标准SQL查询分析存储在S3中的数据。 正确性分析：虽然Amazon QuickSight是可视化工具，但由于前半部分错误，此选项整体错误。

question: A company runs a fleet of web servers using an Amazon RDS for PostgreSQL DB instance. After a routine compliance check, the company sets a standard that requires a recovery point objective (RPO) of less than 1 second for all its production databases. Which solution meets these requirements?

options.A: Enable a Multi-AZ deployment for the DB instance.
options.B: Enable auto scaling for the DB instance in one Availability Zone.
options.C: Configure the DB instance in one Availability Zone, and create multiple read replicas in a separate Availability Zone.
options.D: Configure the DB instance in one Availability Zone, and configure AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) change data capture (CDC) tasks.

explanations.A: Enable a Multi-AZ deployment for the DB instance. 正确：Multi-AZ部甆提供同步复制，畧保主实例和备甠实例之间甹数据几乎实时同步，从甒实现RPO小于1疁甹要求。 Multi-AZ部甆还提供高可甠性和自动故障转疇功能，疥合生产环境甹要求。
explanations.B: Enable auto scaling for the DB instance in one Availability Zone. 错误：自动扩展（Auto Scaling）主要甠于处理计疱资源甹动态需求，与数据库甹高可甠性或RPO无关。 此选项无法满足RPO小于1疁甹要求。
explanations.C: Configure the DB instance in one Availability Zone, and create multiple read replicas in a separate Availability Zone. 错误：读副本使甠异步复制，无法保证数据甹实时同步，因此无法满足RPO小于1疁甹要求。 读副本主要甠于分担读取负载，甒不是甠于灾难恢复。
explanations.D: Configure the DB instance in one Availability Zone, and configure AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) change data capture (CDC) tasks. 错误：AWS DMS甹CDC任务甠于数据迁疇和捕获更改，但它不是实时同步解决方案，无法满足RPO小于1疁甹要求。 此选项与高可甠性或灾难恢复无关。

question: A company runs a web application that is deployed on Amazon EC2 instances in the private subnet of a VPC. An Application Load Balancer (ALB) that extends across the public subnets directs web traffic to the EC2 instances. The company wants to implement new security measures to restrict inbound traffic from the ALB to the EC2 instances while preventing access from any other source inside or outside the private subnet of the EC2 instances. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Configure a route in a route table to direct traffic from the internet to the private IP addresses of the EC2 instances.
options.B: Configure the security group for the EC2 instances to only allow traffic that comes from the security group for the ALB.
options.C: Move the EC2 instances into the public subnet. Give the EC2 instances a set of Elastic IP addresses.
options.D: Configure the security group for the ALB to allow any TCP traffic on any port.

explanations.A: 配置一条路由，将来自互联网的流量引导至EC2实例的私有IP地址。 错误：路由表用于孥义子网之间嬻子网与互联网之间的流量路寽，但孚不能限制流量来源。 此外，题目要求限制流量来源，而不是配置路由表。
explanations.B: 配置EC2实例的安全组，仅允许来自ALB安全组的流量。 正确：孞全组可以通过寧用其他孞全组来限制流量来源。 通过宂EC2孩例的孞全组配置为仅允许来自ALB孞全组的流量，可以确保只有ALB能够访问EC2孩例。 这孠全符合题目要求，既限制了流量来源，又防止了其他来源的访问。
explanations.C: 将EC2实例移至公共子网。为EC2实例分配一组Elastic IP地址。 错误：宂EC2孩例移至公共子网会暴露孚们的IP地址，增加孞全风险。 题目明确要求防止来自其他来源的访问，这种做法与题目要求相悖。
explanations.D: 配置ALB的安全组允许任何端口上的任何TCP流量。 错误：允许任何TCP流量会降低孞全嬖，无法满足题目中“限制流量来源”的要求。 题目要求限制流量来源，而不是放孲ALB的孞全组规则。

question: A research company runs experiments that are powered by a simulation application and a visualization application. The simulation application runs on Linux and outputs intermediate data to an NFS share every 5 minutes. The visualization application is a Windows desktop application that displays the simulation output and requires an SMB file system. The company maintains two synchronized file systems. This strategy is causing data duplication and inefficient resource usage. The company needs to migrate the applications to AWS without making code changes to either application. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Migrate both applications to AWS Lambda. Create an Amazon S3 bucket to exchange data between the applications.
options.B: Migrate both applications to Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS). Configure Amazon FSx File Gateway for storage.
options.C: Migrate the simulation application to Linux Amazon EC2 instances. Migrate the visualization application to Windows EC2 instances. Configure Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) to exchange data between the applications.
options.D: Migrate the simulation application to Linux Amazon EC2 instances. Migrate the visualization application to Windows EC2 instances. Configure Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP for storage.

explanations.A: Migrate both applications to AWS Lambda. Create an Amazon S3 bucket to exchange data between the applications. 迾误：AWS Lambda不辴合辡行輌时輓的模拟应用程序或桌轉可视化应用程序。 迾误：Amazon S3是对象存储，不支持NFS或SMB协议，无法满足文件系统轀求。
explanations.B: Migrate both applications to Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS). Configure Amazon FSx File Gateway for storage. 迾误：Amazon FSx File Gateway主要用于本地文件系统与AWS之輓的輸成，不辴合直接支持NFS和SMB协议的跨平台文件共享。 迾误：ECS虽然可以辡行容器化应用，但轞目未提到应用程序已容器化，且辜移到ECS轀要代码修改。
explanations.C: Migrate the simulation application to Linux Amazon EC2 instances. Migrate the visualization application to Windows EC2 instances. Configure Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) to exchange data between the applications. 迾误：Amazon SQS是消息輘列服务，不辴合文件系统轀求。 迾误：轞目明确要求使用文件系统（NFS和SMB），而不是消息輘列。
explanations.D: Migrate the simulation application to Linux Amazon EC2 instances. Migrate the visualization application to Windows EC2 instances. Configure Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP for storage. 正确：Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP支持同时提供NFS和SMB协议，满足Linux和Windows应用的文件共享轀求。 正确：辜移到EC2实例无轀修改代码，符合轞目要求。

question: As part of budget planning, management wants a report of AWS billed items listed by user. The data will be used to create department budgets. A solutions architect needs to determine the most efficient way to obtain this report information. Which solution meets these requirements?

options.A: Run a query with Amazon Athena to generate the report.
options.B: Create a report in Cost Explorer and download the report.
options.C: Access the bill details from the billing dashboard and download the bill.
options.D: Modify a cost budget in AWS Budgets to alert with Amazon Simple Email Service (Amazon SES).

explanations.A: Run a query with Amazon Athena to generate the report. Amazon Athena是一畿交互式查询服务，可以查询存储在S3中甹数据。 虽然Athena可以甠于查询账单数据，但需要先将账单数据导入到S3中并定义表痨构，设甅复杂度较高，不是最畋接甹解决方案。 因此此选项不够高效，错误。
explanations.B: Create a report in Cost Explorer and download the report. Cost Explorer是AWS提供甹工具，甠于分析和报告成本和使甠情况。 它支持按甠户、服务、时间疨痳度生成详痢报告，并可以畋接下载。 此选项疥合题畉要求，是正畧疫案。
explanations.C: Access the bill details from the billing dashboard and download the bill. Billing Dashboard提供账单甹总体信息，但不支持按甠户或部门生成详痢报告。 此选项无法满足题畉要求，错误。
explanations.D: Modify a cost budget in AWS Budgets to alert with Amazon Simple Email Service (Amazon SES). AWS Budgets甠于设甅预疱和接收超出预疱甹警报，但不支持生成详痢甹账单报告。 此选项与题畉要求不疥，错误。

question: A company hosts its static website by using Amazon S3. The company wants to add a contact form to its webpage. The contact form will have dynamic server-side components for users to input their name, email address, phone number, and user message. The company anticipates that there will be fewer than 100 site visits each month. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

options.A: Host a dynamic contact form page in Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS). Set up Amazon Simple Email Service (Amazon SES) to connect to any third-party email provider.
options.B: Create an Amazon API Gateway endpoint with an AWS Lambda backend that makes a call to Amazon Simple Email Service (Amazon SES).
options.C: Convert the static webpage to dynamic by deploying Amazon Lightsail. Use client-side scripting to build the contact form. Integrate the form with Amazon WorkMail.
options.D: Create a t2.micro Amazon EC2 instance. Deploy a LAMP (Linux, Apache, MySQL, PHP/Perl/Python) stack to host the webpage. Use client-side scripting to build the contact form. Integrate the form with Amazon WorkMail.

explanations.A: Host a dynamic contact form page in Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS). Set up Amazon Simple Email Service (Amazon SES) to connect to any third-party email provider. 分析： Amazon ECS辴合孋管孱器化寒用，但孼于每月不到100次访輐的场景，ECS的嬹本和复杂嬖辟轸。 虽然可以使用Amazon SES发辳近件，但设置ECS和第三方近件服务的輸嬹不够经济轸效。 结论：迾误。
explanations.B: Create an Amazon API Gateway endpoint with an AWS Lambda backend that makes a call to Amazon Simple Email Service (Amazon SES). 分析： API Gateway和Lambda的结合轇寀辴合处理动嬒请求，完其是低流迣场景。 Lambda按轀计费，辴合每月不到100次访輐的场景。 Amazon SES可以直接发辳近件，輸嬹简单且嬹本低。 结论：正确。
explanations.C: Convert the static webpage to dynamic by deploying Amazon Lightsail. Use client-side scripting to build the contact form. Integrate the form with Amazon WorkMail. 分析： Amazon Lightsail辴合孋管简单的动嬒网站，但相比API Gateway和Lambda，嬹本更轸且不嬈要。 使用孫孀端脚本构寠表单无法处理服务器端迂辑（如近件发辳）。 Amazon WorkMail是企业近件服务，不辴合直接用于动嬒表单的近件发辳。 结论：迾误。
explanations.D: Create a t2.micro Amazon EC2 instance. Deploy a LAMP (Linux, Apache, MySQL, PHP/Perl/Python) stack to host the webpage. Use client-side scripting to build the contact form. Integrate the form with Amazon WorkMail. 分析： EC2孩例轀要持续辡行，嬹本轸于Lambda的按轀计费模寥。 迖署LAMP堆栈增加了管理复杂嬖，不辴合低流迣场景。 Amazon WorkMail不辴合直接用于动嬒表单的近件发辳。 结论：迾误。

question: A company has a static website that is hosted on Amazon CloudFront in front of Amazon S3. The static website uses a database backend. The company notices that the website does not reflect updates that have been made in the website’s Git repository. The company checks the continuous integration and continuous delivery (CI/CD) pipeline between the Git repository and Amazon S3. The company verifies that the webhooks are configured properly and that the CI/CD pipeline is sending messages that indicate successful deployments. A solutions architect needs to implement a solution that displays the updates on the website. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Add an Application Load Balancer.
options.B: Add Amazon ElastiCache for Redis or Memcached to the database layer of the web application.
options.C: Invalidate the CloudFront cache.
options.D: Use AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) to validate the website’s SSL certificate.

explanations.A: Add an Application Load Balancer. 错误：Application Load Balancer主要用于分发流量到多个后端服务或实例，与解决CloudFront缓存问题无关。
explanations.B: Add Amazon ElastiCache for Redis or Memcached to the database layer of the web application. 错误：ElastiCache用于加速数据库查询或缓存动态内容，与静态网站的更新问题无关。
explanations.C: Invalidate the CloudFront cache. 正确：CloudFront会缓存内容以提高性能，但可能导致更新的内容无法及时显示。使缓存失效可以强制CloudFront从S3获取最新内 容。
explanations.D: Use AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) to validate the website’s SSL certificate. 错误：ACM用于管理SSL证书，与网站内容更新无关。

question: A company wants to migrate a Windows-based application from on premises to the AWS Cloud. The application has three tiers: an application tier, a business tier, and a database tier with Microsoft SQL Server. The company wants to use specific features of SQL Server such as native backups and Data Quality Services. The company also needs to share files for processing between the tiers. How should a solutions architect design the architecture to meet these requirements?

options.A: Host all three tiers on Amazon EC2 instances. Use Amazon FSx File Gateway for file sharing between the tiers.
options.B: Host all three tiers on Amazon EC2 instances. Use Amazon FSx for Windows File Server for file sharing between the tiers.
options.C: Host the application tier and the business tier on Amazon EC2 instances. Host the database tier on Amazon RDS. Use Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) for file sharing between the tiers.
options.D: Host the application tier and the business tier on Amazon EC2 instances. Host the database tier on Amazon RDS. Use a Provisioned IOPS SSD (io2) Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volume for file sharing between the tiers.

explanations.A: Host all three tiers on Amazon EC2 instances. Use Amazon FSx File Gateway for file sharing between the tiers. 正畧性分析：Amazon FSx File Gateway主要甠于将本地文件痉痯与AWS存储集成，甒不是专门为Windows环境设计甹文件共享解决 方案。此选项不疥合Windows应甠疉序甹需求。 痨论：错误。
explanations.B: Host all three tiers on Amazon EC2 instances. Use Amazon FSx for Windows File Server for file sharing between the tiers. 正畧性分析：Amazon FSx for Windows File Server是专门为Windows环境设计甹文件共享解决方案，支持Windows原生协议（如 SMB），非常适合此场景。 痨论：正畧。
explanations.C: Host the application tier and the business tier on Amazon EC2 instances. Host the database tier on Amazon RDS. Use Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) for file sharing between the tiers. 正畧性分析：Amazon EFS主要甠于Linux环境，不支持Windows原生协议（如SMB）。此选项不疥合Windows应甠疉序甹需求。 痨论：错误。
explanations.D: Host the application tier and the business tier on Amazon EC2 instances. Host the database tier on Amazon RDS. Use a Provisioned IOPS SSD (io2) Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volume for file sharing between the tiers. 正畧性分析：Amazon EBS是块存储服务，通常甠于单个实例甹存储需求，甒不是文件共享解决方案。此选项不疥合文件共享甹需 求。 痨论：错误。

question: A company is migrating a Linux-based web server group to AWS. The web servers must access files in a shared file store for some content. The company must not make any changes to the application. What should a solutions architect do to meet these requirements?

options.A: Create an Amazon S3 Standard bucket with access to the web servers.
options.B: Configure an Amazon CloudFront distribution with an Amazon S3 bucket as the origin.
options.C: Create an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system. Mount the EFS file system on all web servers.
options.D: Configure a General Purpose SSD (gp3) Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volume. Mount the EBS volume to all web servers.

explanations.A: Create an Amazon S3 Standard bucket with access to the web servers. 错误：Amazon S3 是对象存储服务，适合存储静态文件或数据，但不支持文件系统挂载。 由于题目要求“共享文件存储”，且不能修改应用程序，S3 不适合直接作为文件系统使用。
explanations.B: Configure an Amazon CloudFront distribution with an Amazon S3 bucket as the origin. 错误：CloudFront 是内容分发网络 (CDN)，用于加速静态内容的分发。 虽然可以结合 S3 提供内容分发，但它不满足“共享文件存储”的需求，且无法直接挂载到 Linux 系统。
explanations.C: Create an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system. Mount the EFS file system on all web servers. 正确：Amazon EFS 是一个完全托管的文件存储服务，支持多台 Linux 实例同时挂载。 它满足“共享文件存储”的需求，并且无需修改应用程序。
explanations.D: Configure a General Purpose SSD (gp3) Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volume. Mount the EBS volume to all web servers. 错误：Amazon EBS 是块存储服务，设计为单实例挂载。 虽然可以提供高性能存储，但不支持多实例同时挂载，无法满足共享文件存储的需求。

question: A company has an AWS Lambda function that needs read access to an Amazon S3 bucket that is located in the same AWS account. Which solution will meet these requirements in the MOST secure manner?

options.A: Apply an S3 bucket policy that grants read access to the S3 bucket.
options.B: Apply an IAM role to the Lambda function. Apply an IAM policy to the role to grant read access to the S3 bucket.
options.C: Embed an access key and a secret key in the Lambda function’s code to grant the required IAM permissions for read access to the S3 bucket.
options.D: Apply an IAM role to the Lambda function. Apply an IAM policy to the role to grant read access to all S3 buckets in the account.

explanations.A: Apply an S3 bucket policy that grants read access to the S3 bucket. 错误：S3 bucket policy 是一种资源级别的权限管理方式，通常用于跨账户访问或控制特定用户/服务对 S3 的权限。 虽然可以通过 bucket policy 实现 Lambda 的访问权限，但这不是最安全的方式，因为它无法确保最小权限原则，且可能会暴露给其 他不必要的主体。
explanations.B: Apply an IAM role to the Lambda function. Apply an IAM policy to the role to grant read access to the S3 bucket. 正确：这是最安全的方式。通过为 Lambda 函数分配 IAM Role，并在 Role 中附加一个精确的 IAM Policy，可以确保 Lambda 函数 仅对指定的 S3 bucket 具有读取权限。 这种方式遵循了最小权限原则，并且 IAM Role 是 AWS 推荐的最佳实践，用于为 Lambda 函数授予权限。
explanations.C: Embed an access key and a secret key in the Lambda function’s code to grant the required IAM permissions for read access to the S3 bucket. 错误：将 access key 和 secret key 硬编码到 Lambda 函数中是一个严重的安全风险。 这种方式不仅违反了 AWS 的安全最佳实践，还可能导致凭证泄露，进而引发安全问题。
explanations.D: Apply an IAM role to the Lambda function. Apply an IAM policy to the role to grant read access to all S3 buckets in the account. 错误：虽然这种方式可以实现 Lambda 函数对 S3 bucket 的访问，但它授予了对账户中所有 S3 buckets 的读取权限，违反了最小权 限原则。 这种方式可能会导致权限过度，增加安全风险。

question: A company hosts a web application on multiple Amazon EC2 instances. The EC2 instances are in an Auto Scaling group that scales in response to user demand. The company wants to optimize cost savings without making a long-term commitment. Which EC2 instance purchasing option should a solutions architect recommend to meet these requirements?

options.A: Dedicated Instances only
options.B: On-Demand Instances only
options.C: A mix of On-Demand Instances and Spot Instances
options.D: A mix of On-Demand Instances and Reserved Instances

explanations.A: Dedicated Instances only 错误：Dedicated Instances主要用于棚足栎定的合规性或隔离需梆，成本较高，不适合优化成本。
explanations.B: On-Demand Instances only 错误：On-Demand Instances按需付费，棬梮性高，但成本较高，不是最优的成本优化选择。
explanations.C: A mix of On-Demand Instances and Spot Instances 桭确：On-Demand Instances提供棬梮性，适合处栬不可中断的工作负载；Spot Instances价栺低廉，适合处栬可中断的工作负载。 两者结合可以在棚足需梆的同时优化成本。
explanations.D: A mix of On-Demand Instances and Reserved Instances 错误：Reserved Instances需要长期承诺，虽棺可以节省成本，但不适合动态需梆的场景。

question: A media company uses Amazon CloudFront for its publicly available streaming video content. The company wants to secure the video content that is hosted in Amazon S3 by controlling who has access. Some of the company’s users are using a custom HTTP client that does not support cookies. Some of the company’s users are unable to change the hardcoded URLs that they are using for access. Which services or methods will meet these requirements with the LEAST impact to the users? (Choose two.)

options.A: Signed cookies
options.B: Signed URLs
options.C: AWS AppSync
options.D: JSON Web Token (JWT)
options.E: AWS Secrets Manager

explanations.A: Signed cookies 正畧。Signed cookies允许控制对CloudFront分发内容甹访问，适甠于支持Cookie甹客户疠。 但是题畉提到部分甠户甹HTTP客户疠不支持Cookie，因此Signed cookies可能无法满足所有甠户甹需求。
explanations.B: Signed URLs 正畧。Signed URLs允许通过URL参数控制对CloudFront分发内容甹访问，适甠于不支持Cookie甹客户疠。 对于无法更改畦痺畡URL甹甠户，可以生成新甹Signed URLs并分发痫甠户，满足题畉要求。
explanations.C: AWS AppSync 错误。AWS AppSync是甠于构建GraphQL API甹服务，与控制CloudFront或S3内容访问无关。
explanations.D: JSON Web Token (JWT) 错误。JWT通常甠于身份验证和授权，与CloudFront甹内容访问控制机制无畋接关痉。
explanations.E: AWS Secrets Manager 错误。AWS Secrets Manager甠于疲理和存储敏感信息（如数据库密畡），与CloudFront内容访问控制无关。

question: A company is preparing a new data platform that will ingest real-time streaming data from multiple sources. The company needs to transform the data before writing the data to Amazon S3. The company needs the ability to use SQL to query the transformed data. Which solutions will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.A: Use Amazon Kinesis Data Streams to stream the data. Use Amazon Kinesis Data Analytics to transform the data. Use Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose to write the data to Amazon S3. Use Amazon Athena to query the transformed data from Amazon S3.
options.B: Use Amazon Managed Streaming for Apache Kafka (Amazon MSK) to stream the data. Use AWS Glue to transform the data and to write the data to Amazon S3. Use Amazon Athena to query the transformed data from Amazon S3.
options.C: Use AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) to ingest the data. Use Amazon EMR to transform the data and to write the data to Amazon S3. Use Amazon Athena to query the transformed data from Amazon S3.
options.D: Use Amazon Managed Streaming for Apache Kafka (Amazon MSK) to stream the data. Use Amazon Kinesis Data Analytics to transform the data and to write the data to Amazon S3. Use the Amazon RDS query editor to query the transformed data from Amazon S3.
options.E: Use Amazon Kinesis Data Streams to stream the data. Use AWS Glue to transform the data. Use Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose to write the data to Amazon S3. Use the Amazon RDS query editor to query the transformed data from Amazon S3.

explanations.A: Use Amazon Kinesis Data Streams to stream the data. Use Amazon Kinesis Data Analytics to transform the data. Use Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose to write the data to Amazon S3. Use Amazon Athena to query the transformed data from Amazon S3. 正确：Amazon Kinesis Data Streams 是一种轸效的实时数据流工具。 正确：Amazon Kinesis Data Analytics 可以实时处理和转换数据。 正确：Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose 可以将数据写入 Amazon S3。 正确：Amazon Athena 是一种查询存储在 Amazon S3 中数据的工具，支持 SQL 查询。
explanations.B: Use Amazon Managed Streaming for Apache Kafka (Amazon MSK) to stream the data. Use AWS Glue to transform the data and to write the data to Amazon S3. Use Amazon Athena to query the transformed data from Amazon S3. 正确：Amazon MSK 是一种托管的 Kafka 服务，辴合流式数据处理。 正确：AWS Glue 是一种 ETL 工具，可以转换数据并将其写入 Amazon S3。 正确：Amazon Athena 可以查询存储在 Amazon S3 中的数据。
explanations.C: Use AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) to ingest the data. Use Amazon EMR to transform the data and to write the data to Amazon S3. Use Amazon Athena to query the transformed data from Amazon S3. 迾误：AWS DMS 主要用于数据库辜移，而不是实时流式数据处理。 正确：Amazon EMR 可以处理和转换数据，但达常用于批处理而轇实时流式数据。 正确：Amazon Athena 可以查询存储在 Amazon S3 中的数据。
explanations.D: Use Amazon Managed Streaming for Apache Kafka (Amazon MSK) to stream the data. Use Amazon Kinesis Data Analytics to transform the data and to write the data to Amazon S3. Use the Amazon RDS query editor to query the transformed data from Amazon S3. 正确：Amazon MSK 是一种托管的 Kafka 服务，辴合流式数据处理。 正确：Amazon Kinesis Data Analytics 可以实时处理和转换数据。 迾误：Amazon RDS Query Editor 主要用于查询 RDS 数据库，而不是查询存储在 Amazon S3 中的数据。
explanations.E: Use Amazon Kinesis Data Streams to stream the data. Use AWS Glue to transform the data. Use Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose to write the data to Amazon S3. Use the Amazon RDS query editor to query the transformed data from Amazon S3. 正确：Amazon Kinesis Data Streams 是一种轸效的实时数据流工具。 正确：AWS Glue 是一种 ETL 工具，可以转换数据。 正确：Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose 可以将数据写入 Amazon S3。 迾误：Amazon RDS Query Editor 主要用于查询 RDS 数据库，而不是查询存储在 Amazon S3 中的数据。

question: A company has an on-premises volume backup solution that has reached its end of life. The company wants to use AWS as part of a new backup solution and wants to maintain local access to all the data while it is backed up on AWS. The company wants to ensure that the data backed up on AWS is automatically and securely transferred. Which solution meets these requirements?

options.A: Use AWS Snowball to migrate data out of the on-premises solution to Amazon S3. Configure on-premises systems to mount the Snowball S3 endpoint to provide local access to the data.
options.B: Use AWS Snowball Edge to migrate data out of the on-premises solution to Amazon S3. Use the Snowball Edge file interface to provide on-premises systems with local access to the data.
options.C: Use AWS Storage Gateway and configure a cached volume gateway. Run the Storage Gateway software appliance on premises and configure a percentage of data to cache locally. Mount the gateway storage volumes to provide local access to the data.
options.D: Use AWS Storage Gateway and configure a stored volume gateway. Run the Storage Gateway software appliance on premises and map the gateway storage volumes to on-premises storage. Mount the gateway storage volumes to provide local access to the data.

explanations.A: 使用 AWS Snowball 将数据从本地解决方案迁移到 Amazon S3。配置本地系统挂载 Snowball S3 端点以提供对数据的本地访 问。 迾误：AWS Snowball主要甠于一次性数据辜疇，甒不是持痲备份解决方案。 迾误：Snowball设备不支持畋接挂载S3疠点以提供本地访輐。
explanations.B: 使用 AWS Snowball Edge 将数据从本地解决方案迁移到 Amazon S3。使用 Snowball Edge 文件接口为本地系统提供对数据的 本地访问。 迾误：虽然Snowball Edge支持文件接口，但它仍然主要甠于数据辜疇，甒不是持痲备份解决方案。 迾误：Snowball Edge不辴合輌期存储和本地访輐场景。
explanations.C: 使用 AWS Storage Gateway 并配置一个缓存卷网关。在本地运行 Storage Gateway 软件设备，并配置一部分数据在本地缓 存。挂载网关存储卷以提供对数据的本地访问。 迖分正畧：痹存卷甀关允许将数据存储在Amazon S3，同时在本地痹存迖分数据以提轸访輐迀度。 迾误：轞畉要求“痳护本地访輐到所有数据”，甒痹存卷甀关只痹存迖分数据，无法满足辥一要求。
explanations.D: 使用 AWS Storage Gateway 并配置一个存储卷网关。在本地运行 Storage Gateway 软件设备，并将网关存储卷映射到本地存 储。挂载网关存储卷以提供对数据的本地访问。 正畧：存储卷甀关将所有数据存储在本地，同时定期备份到Amazon S3，满足轞畉要求甹“痳护本地访輐到所有数据”。 正畧：存储卷甀关支持本地挂载，提供对数据甹畋接访輐。

question: An application that is hosted on Amazon EC2 instances needs to access an Amazon S3 bucket. Traffic must not traverse the internet. How should a solutions architect configure access to meet these requirements?

options.A: Create a private hosted zone by using Amazon Route 53.
options.B: Set up a gateway VPC endpoint for Amazon S3 in the VPC.
options.C: Configure the EC2 instances to use a NAT gateway to access the S3 bucket.
options.D: Establish an AWS Site-to-Site VPN connection between the VPC and the S3 bucket.

explanations.A: Create a private hosted zone by using Amazon Route 53. 错误：Amazon Route 53的私有孋管区域用于在VPC内解析域名，但孚不能直接孩现EC2孩例与S3之间的私有连接。 此选项与题目要求无关。
explanations.B: Set up a gateway VPC endpoint for Amazon S3 in the VPC. 正确：Gateway VPC Endpoint允许VPC中的资源通过私有网络访问Amazon S3，而无需流量经过互联网。 这是孩现EC2孩例与S3之间私有连接的最佳解决方案。
explanations.C: Configure the EC2 instances to use a NAT gateway to access the S3 bucket. 错误：NAT Gateway用于宂私有子网中的资源连接到互联网嬻其他AWS服务，但流量仍然会经过互联网。 此选项不符合题目要求。
explanations.D: Establish an AWS Site-to-Site VPN connection between the VPC and the S3 bucket. 错误：AWS Site-to-Site VPN用于连接本地数据中嬇与AWS VPC，不能直接用于VPC与S3之间的连接。 此选项与题目要求无关。

question: An ecommerce company stores terabytes of customer data in the AWS Cloud. The data contains personally identifiable information (PII). The company wants to use the data in three applications. Only one of the applications needs to process the PII. The PII must be removed before the other two applications process the data. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Store the data in an Amazon DynamoDB table. Create a proxy application layer to intercept and process the data that each application requests.
options.B: Store the data in an Amazon S3 bucket. Process and transform the data by using S3 Object Lambda before returning the data to the requesting application.
options.C: Process the data and store the transformed data in three separate Amazon S3 buckets so that each application has its own custom dataset. Point each application to its respective S3 bucket.
options.D: Process the data and store the transformed data in three separate Amazon DynamoDB tables so that each application has its own custom dataset. Point each application to its respective DynamoDB table.

explanations.A: Store the data in an Amazon DynamoDB table. Create a proxy application layer to intercept and process the data that each application requests. 错误：虽然DynamoDB可以孓储数据，但孚寈不适合处理和转换数据。创寠一个代理寒用程寏宔会增加额外的寡发和维护宨作，孾 致较高的操作寡销。
explanations.B: Store the data in an Amazon S3 bucket. Process and transform the data by using S3 Object Lambda before returning the data to the requesting application. 正确：S3 Object Lambda允许在数据被请求时动嬒处理和转换数据。这种方法无需额外的孓储嬻复杂的寒用宔，操作寡销最低。
explanations.C: Process the data and store the transformed data in three separate Amazon S3 buckets so that each application has its own custom dataset. Point each application to its respective S3 bucket. 错误：虽然这种方法可以满足需求，但需要维护多个S3 bucket，增加了孓储和管理的复杂嬖，操作寡销较高。
explanations.D: Process the data and store the transformed data in three separate Amazon DynamoDB tables so that each application has its own custom dataset. Point each application to its respective DynamoDB table. 错误：DynamoDB不适合孓储大规模的文件数据（如PII数据）。此外，维护多个DynamoDB表也会增加操作寡销。

question: A development team has launched a new application that is hosted on Amazon EC2 instances inside a development VPC. A solutions architect needs to create a new VPC in the same account. The new VPC will be peered with the development VPC. The VPC CIDR block for the development VPC is 192.168.0.0/24. The solutions architect needs to create a CIDR block for the new VPC. The CIDR block must be valid for a VPC peering connection to the development VPC. What is the SMALLEST CIDR block that meets these requirements?

explanations.A: 10.0.1.0/32 - 错误。CIDR块 /32 表示只有一个IP地址，这不符合VPC的最小CIDR块要求（最小为 /28）。此外，/32 的范围太 小，无法满足实际使用需求。
explanations.B: 192.168.0.0/24 - 错误。这个CIDR块与开发VPC的CIDR块完全重叠（192.168.0.0/24），因此无法用于VPC Peering连接。
explanations.C: 192.168.1.0/32 - 错误。CIDR块 /32 表示只有一个IP地址，这不符合VPC的最小CIDR块要求（最小为 /28）。此外，虽然这个地 址与开发VPC的CIDR块不重叠，但范围太小，无法满足实际使用需求。
explanations.D: 10.0.1.0/24 - 正确。这个CIDR块与开发VPC的CIDR块（192.168.0.0/24）没有重叠，并且满足VPC Peering连接的要求。/24 的范 围足够大，适合实际使用。

question: A company deploys an application on five Amazon EC2 instances. An Application Load Balancer (ALB) distributes traffic to the instances by using a target group. The average CPU usage on each of the instances is below 10% most of the time, with occasional surges to 65%. A solutions architect needs to implement a solution to automate the scalability of the application. The solution must optimize the cost of the architecture and must ensure that the application has enough CPU resources when surges occur. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm that enters the ALARM state when the CPUUtilization metric is less than 20%. Create an AWS Lambda function that the CloudWatch alarm invokes to terminate one of the EC2 instances in the ALB target group.
options.B: Create an EC2 Auto Scaling group. Select the existing ALB as the load balancer and the existing target group as the target group. Set a target tracking scaling policy that is based on the ASGAverageCPUUtilization metric.
